description_long: This is a whimsical ceramic cup shaped to resemble a cartoonish face, with exaggerated features including large, bulging eyes, a prominent rounded nose, and a wide, open mouth forming the lower part of the cup. The handle is smoothly integrated into the side, mimicking an ear, while the opposite side features a rounded protrusion that resembles the other ear. The cup is predominantly a pale, pinkish-beige color, with the facial features sculpted in relief and painted details for the eyes and mouth. The interior is smooth and white, suitable for holding liquids. The overall finish is glossy, giving the cup a playful and eye-catching appearance that would stand out in any urban kitchen or café setting.
description: A glossy, pale pink cup shaped like a cartoon face with large eyes, a big nose, and an ear-shaped handle. The playful design and smooth finish make it visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full cartoon face with bulging eyes, a large nose, and a wide open mouth, as well as the handle on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the ear-shaped handle and the rounded ear-like protrusion on the opposite side, with the facial features partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, featureless back of the cup, with both the handle and the opposite protrusion visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focuses on the handle and the rounded protrusion, with the top rim and part of the face just visible.
